text: High R&D intensity indicates technology platform dependence and execution risk. R&D expenses reached $610,000,000 in Q2 2025, representing 19.70% of revenue [C009, K005]. This substantial investment suggests the company must continuously innovate to maintain platform competitiveness and user experience. Failure to effectively deploy R&D capital could result in technology obsolescence or loss of market position to competitors. The marketplace model described in the company profile relies on maintaining a robust online and mobile platform to connect hosts and guests [C002], making technology execution critical to operations.

citations.text_snippet: Airbnb, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates a platform that enables hosts to offer stays and experiences to guests worldwide.
